stemHtml: In accordance with ICAO Annex 2, Rules of the Air, a controlled flight operated in VMC which encounters a communication failure shall...

options.a: use the emergency frequency to inform the ATC unit about the failure and land at the nearest aerodrome.
options.b: make use of the specific provisions for visual signals and set the transponder code for communication failure.
options.c: continue to fly in VMC to the nearest suitable aerodrome and after landing inform the appropriate ATC unit as soon as possible.
options.d: continue to fly in VMC to the destination aerodrome and after landing inform the appropriate ATC unit.
